spec_match.rationale: Builds Use-As-Dictionary header with match (UrlPattern), match-dest, type, ttl — matches the spec's directive set.

interactive.rationale: Text inputs, dest chips, URL probe rows — full builder with live match preview.

edge_cases.rationale: Invalid URLPattern syntax is now rejected inline and suppresses the generated Use-As-Dictionary header. Dictionary size limits and overlapping match patterns remain open.

design_system.rationale: All CSS uses design-system variables, user-entered probe URLs render as text, and the probe controls are labelled.

openQuestions.title: Test conflicting match patterns
openQuestions.detail: Show longest-match precedence when two dictionaries' match patterns overlap.

summary: Chrome 148 DevTools verification: /static/app-* emits a Use-As-Dictionary header and matches script probes; /static/:id( reports invalid URLPattern syntax, sets aria-invalid=true, and suppresses the header. The conformance route reports 5 pass / 0 fail with no console messages.
